'''kojawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulpinary|vulpinary]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulpinary|vulpinary]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kojawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojawithi|kojawithi]] || [[word:kojawiji|kojawiji]] || [[word:kojawishi|kojawishi]] || [[word:kojawiki|kojawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojawuthuthu|kojawuthuthu]] || [[word:kojawujuju|kojawujuju]] || [[word:kojawushushu|kojawushushu]] || [[word:kojawukuku|kojawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojawuthu|kojawuthu]] || [[word:kojawuju|kojawuju]] || [[word:kojawushu|kojawushu]] || [[word:kojawuku|kojawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojawufthuf|kojawufthuf]] || [[word:kojawufjuf|kojawufjuf]] || [[word:kojawufshuf|kojawufshuf]] || [[word:kojawufkuf|kojawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojawethe|kojawethe]] || [[word:kojaweje|kojaweje]] || [[word:kojaweshe|kojaweshe]] || [[word:kojaweke|kojaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojawothotho|kojawothotho]] || [[word:kojawojojo|kojawojojo]] || [[word:kojawoshosho|kojawoshosho]] || [[word:kojawokoko|kojawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojawotho|kojawotho]] || [[word:kojawojo|kojawojo]] || [[word:kojawosho|kojawosho]] || [[word:kojawoko|kojawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojawofthof|kojawofthof]] || [[word:kojawofjof|kojawofjof]] || [[word:kojawofshof|kojawofshof]] || [[word:kojawofkof|kojawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfthÃŸf|kojawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfjÃŸf|kojawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfshÃŸf|kojawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfkÃŸf|kojawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kojawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kojawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kojawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kojawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfthÃŸf|kojawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfjÃŸf|kojawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfshÃŸf|kojawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfkÃŸf|kojawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfthÃŸf|kojawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfjÃŸf|kojawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfshÃŸf|kojawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kojawÃŸfkÃŸf|kojawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojawÃḊthÃḊ|kojawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kojawÃḊjÃḊ|kojawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kojawÃḊshÃḊ|kojawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kojawÃḊkÃḊ|kojawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojawathatha|kojawathatha]] || [[word:kojawajaja|kojawajaja]] || [[word:kojawashasha|kojawashasha]] || [[word:kojawakaka|kojawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojawatha|kojawatha]] || [[word:kojawaja|kojawaja]] || [[word:kojawasha|kojawasha]] || [[word:kojawaka|kojawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojawafthaf|kojawafthaf]] || [[word:kojawafjaf|kojawafjaf]] || [[word:kojawafshaf|kojawafshaf]] || [[word:kojawafkaf|kojawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kojawasha|kojawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kojawshÃḋsha|kojawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kojawrosha|kojawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kojawmusha|kojawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kojawyasha|kojawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokojawnkshÃḋsha|gokojawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokojawnkrosha|gokojawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokojawnkmusha|gokojawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokojawnkyasha|gokojawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kojajawasha|kojajawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kojajawshÃḋsha|kojajawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kojajawrosha|kojajawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kojajawmusha|kojajawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kojajawyasha|kojajawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokojajawnkshÃḋsha|gokojajawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokojajawnkrosha|gokojajawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokojajawnkmusha|gokojajawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokojajawnkyasha|gokojajawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kejÃḊwasha|kejÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kejÃḊwshÃḋsha|kejÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kejÃḊwrosha|kejÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kejÃḊwmusha|kejÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kejÃḊwyasha|kejÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokejÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|gokejÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokejÃḊwnkrosha|gokejÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokejÃḊwnkmusha|gokejÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokejÃḊwnkyasha|gokejÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kojfawasha|kojfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kojfawshÃḋsha|kojfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kojfawrosha|kojfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kojfawmusha|kojfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kojfawyasha|kojfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokojfawnkshÃḋsha|gokojfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokojfawnkrosha|gokojfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokojfawnkmusha|gokojfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokojfawnkyasha|gokojfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
